title: Run Admin Commands Without UAC Prompt — Elevated Eye Pipe Server
desc: Named pipe server (wkappbot_elevated) inside Eye for running admin commands. Triad-tested: length-prefixed JSON, MaxAllowedServerInstances for gap-free hot-swap, UIPI-aware ACL (AuthUser+Admin), IsBusy guard defers hot-swap while active, __eye_tick__ returns cached state, 30s drain cap.
steps: 3. HandleClient ReadAsync EyeProxyRequest ExecuteCommand WriteAsync response
author: claude
